turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi uh, I'm calling to fix an appointment. Gynaecology, if you have that.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we do have a gynaecology department. May I know your name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. Dr. Kavitha Reddy handles gynaecology here. She has openings on Friday afternoon — 2 PM, 3:30 PM, or 4:30 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Umm, let me think... 3:30 PM, that should be fine.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. Booked for Priya Jain, Friday at 3:30 PM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy. Confirmation will be sent to your number.
